_readme: 타임스탬프 whisper 단어 실측 (파이프라인 v6 기본)
title: Never doubted ya for a second
expression: Never doubted ya for a second

sentences.en: ★ Mission accomplished. Well done, men. Pack it up. We're goin' home.
sentences.ko: ★ 임무 완수. 수고했다, 제군들. 짐 챙겨. 복귀한다.

sentences.en: So did I tell ya? Nothin' to worry about.
sentences.ko: 거봐, 내가 뭐랬어? 걱정할 거 하나 없다니까.

sentences.en: ★ I knew you were right all along, Woody. Never doubted ya for a second.
sentences.ko: ★ 네 말이 맞을 줄 알았다니까, 우디. 한순간도 의심 안 했어.
